raw_text:
Intern Backend Engineer

CloudStream Technologies — Building scalable real-time data infrastructure for the modern enterprise

Location

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)

Employment Type

Internship (Full-time, Summer/Contract)

Compensation

$22-28/hour

The Opportunity

Join CloudStream Technologies as an Intern Backend Engineer and gain hands-on experience building

scalable distributed systems. You'll work alongside our senior backend team to design, implement, and

test backend services using modern technologies like Python, Go, and PostgreSQL. This internship is

ideal for students or recent graduates looking to strengthen their systems programming, API design, and

database skills in a real-world production environment.

About CloudStream Technologies

CloudStream Technologies is a fast-growing infrastructure software company founded in 2020. We

specialize in building scalable, fault-tolerant backend systems and data processing pipelines for
enterprises across finance, e-commerce, and analytics. Our platform handles billions of events daily, and
we're looking for talented interns to join our backend engineering team and learn from experienced

senior engineers.

Day-to-Day

Develop and maintain RESTful and gRPC APIs in Python or Go under the mentorship of senior
engineers

Write unit tests and integration tests for backend services using pytest and built-in testing frameworks

Collaborate with the team to design and implement database schemas in PostgreSQL, with guidance
on normalization and indexing strategies

Debug and troubleshoot backend service issues using logging, monitoring tools, and code review

feedback

Participate in code reviews, learning best practices in code quality, documentation, and architectural
patterns

Assist in building and deploying microservices to Kubernetes clusters under supervision of DevOps
engineers

Document API endpoints, database schemas, and internal service protocols to improve team
knowledge base

You Have

 Currently pursuing or recently completed (within 1 year) a degree in Computer Science, Computer

Engineering, or related field

Strong understanding of fundamental computer science concepts: data structures, algorithms, and

time/space complexity

Proficiency in at least one backend programming language (Python, Java, Go, or Rust)

Familiarity with relational databases and basic SQL querying

Strong communication skills and willingness to learn from feedback and code reviews

Bonus

Experience with REST API design or HTTP protocols

Exposure to Docker, containerization, or basic DevOps concepts

Familiarity with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows

Previous internship or project experience building backend systems or services

Our Stack

Python   Go   PostgreSQL   Redis   Kafka   REST APIs   gRPC   Docker   Kubernetes   Git

What We Offer

Mentorship from senior backend engineers and architects

Competitive hourly internship compensation

Free lunch daily and unlimited snacks/beverages

Hybrid work flexibility (2-3 days in office)

Professional development budget for courses and certifications

Potential for full-time conversion upon graduation and performance

Health and wellness benefits (gym membership, mental health support)

Apply

Submit your resume, a brief cover letter, and a link to your GitHub profile (or portfolio) to
careers@cloudstream.tech. In your cover letter, highlight one backend project you're most proud of and
what you learned from it. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We aim to respond to all applicants
within 2 weeks.
education_required: Currently pursuing or recently completed (within 1 year) a degree in Computer Science, Computer
